sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Have mercy on me, O Lord, for I cry to you all the day long. O Lord, you are good and forgiving, full of mercy to all who call to you.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: God, in your goodness, you have made a home for the poor.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Take my yoke upon you, says the Lord, and learn from me, for I am meek and humble of heart.

sections.title: Para Amar como Tú
sections.author: Santiago Fernández/Jesse Manibusan
sections.snippet: O God, great is your love, everlasting and true. Señor, danos tu amor para amar como tú.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: How great is the goodness, Lord, that you keep for those who fear you.

sections.title: Blessed Are You
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Do you know how blessed you are when you are poor, when your spirit has been tried, your hope outpoured? Dow you know how lovely will be your reward? Yours is the kingdom.

sections.title: Lord, I Love You
sections.author: Frank Jansen and ValLimar Jansen.
sections.snippet: Lord, I love you; I lift my hands before you. I give you glory; Lord, I give you praise. Lord, I love you; I lift my hands before you. I give you glory and praise.

sections.title: You Are The Light
sections.author: Josh Blakesley
sections.snippet: Light of the world in the cover of the night. Glorious star in the shadows you are shining. Hope for the lost, salvation for the sinner. You conquered the cross with the brightness of your rising!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
